visual_description:
A static, medium-wide shot captures three silhouetted figures in a small boat on a dark body of water at night. The scene is very dimly lit, with only the figures and the boat clearly visible against the blackness. In the upper left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed. The person in the center, who appears to be an older man, stands while the other two are seated. The background is almost entirely black, with a few faint, distant lights visible on the horizon. The camera remains still, creating a somber and mysterious atmosphere. The audio features a man shouting with a loud, booming voice filled with triumphant excitement. His tone is aggressive and full of bravado as he exclaims in Mandarin, "啊，可卡因是你的!" (Ah, cocaine is yours!). The shout echoes slightly, suggesting he is in a large, open space. In the background, the gentle, rhythmic sound of water lapping against a boat can be heard, creating a stark contrast to the man's loud and intense voice.
